help_menu: Click the buttons below to get information about my commands. Note: All commands can be used with /
help_admins: Admin 𝐂𝗈𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗇𝖽𝗌: /pause: Puase the ongoing stream. /resume: Resume the paused stream. /skip: Skip the current stream. /stop: Stop the ongoing stream. /seek [duration in seconds]: Seek the ongoing stream. /seekback [duration in seconds]: Seek the ongoing stream backward. /reload: Reloads the admin cache.
help_auth: Auth 𝐂𝗈𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗇𝖽𝗌: Authorized users can control the ongoing stream without being an admin. /auth: Add a user to the authorized users list. /unauth: Remove a user from the authorized users list.
help_blist: Blacklist 𝐂𝗈𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗇𝖽𝗌: Blacklisted chats and users cannot use the bot. /blacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Add a chat/user to the blacklist. /unblacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Remove a chat/user from the blacklist
help_lang: Language 𝐂𝗈𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗇𝖽𝗌: This bot supports multiple languages. /lang: Change the language of the bot.
help_ping: Ping 𝐂𝗈𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗇𝖽𝗌: /help: Shows the help menu of the bot. /ping: Check the ping and memory usage of the bot. /start: Start the bot. /sudolist: Shows the list of sudo users of the bot.
help_play: Play 𝐂𝗈𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗇𝖽𝗌: You can play music in the video chat using the following commands. /play [song name/youtube url/reply to audio]: Play music in the video chat. /vplay [song name/youtube url/reply to video]: Play music video in the video chat. -f: Force play music in the video chat. -v: Plays music video in the video chat. Example: /play -f -v attention
help_queue: Queue 𝐂𝗈𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗇𝖽𝗌: /queue: Shows the currently queued tracks in the queue.
help_sudo: 𝐒𝗎𝖽𝗈 𝐂𝗈𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗇𝖽𝗌: /ac: 𝐒𝗁𝗈𝗐𝗌 𝐓𝗁𝖾 𝐀𝖼𝗍𝗂𝗏𝖾 𝐂𝖺𝗅𝗅 𝐂𝗈𝗎𝗇𝗍𝗌. /activevc: 𝐒𝗁𝗈𝗐𝗌 𝐓𝗁𝖾 𝐋𝗂𝗌𝗍 𝐎𝖿 𝐓𝗁𝖾 𝐀𝖼𝗍𝗂𝗏𝖾 𝐂𝖺𝗅𝗅𝗌. /𝐁𝗋𝗈𝖺𝖽𝖼𝖺𝗌𝗍 [reply to message]: 𝐁𝗋𝗈𝖺𝖽𝖼𝖺𝗌𝗍 𝐓𝗁𝖾 𝐌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝖺𝗀𝖾 𝐓𝗈 𝐀𝗅𝗅 𝐂𝗁𝖺𝗍. -𝐍𝗈𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗍: 𝐄𝗑𝖼𝗅𝗎𝖽𝖾𝗌 𝐆𝗋𝗈𝗎𝗉 𝐅𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝐓𝗁𝖾 𝐁𝗋𝗈𝖺𝖽𝖼𝖺𝗌𝗍. -u𝗌𝖾𝗋: 𝐈𝗇𝖼𝗅𝗎𝖽𝖾 𝐔𝗌𝖾𝗋𝗌 𝐈𝗇 𝐓𝗁𝖾 𝐁𝗋𝗈𝖺𝖽𝖼𝖺𝗌𝗍. -copy: 𝐑𝖾𝗆𝗈𝗏𝖾𝗌 𝐓𝗁𝖾 𝐅𝗈𝗋𝗐𝗈𝗋𝖽𝗌 𝐓𝖺𝗀 𝐅𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝐓𝗁𝖾 𝐁𝗋𝗈𝖺𝖽𝖼𝖺𝗌𝗍 𝐌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝖺𝗀𝖾. 𝐄𝗑𝖺𝗆𝗉𝗅𝖾: /broadcast -user -copy /eval: Executes the given code. /logs: Sends the log file. /logger [on|off]: Enables/disables the logger. /restart: Restarts the bot. /addsudo: Add a user to the sudo users list. /rmsudo: Remove a user from the sudo users list.
